jobs.title: Director of Artificial Intelligence (AI) & Emerging Technologies (SY26-27)
jobs.scope_summary: Leads district-wide AI strategy, governance, pilots, vendor evaluation, and staff AI literacy training. Applications close July 31.

jobs.title: Senior Director, AI Transformation
jobs.scope_summary: Reports to the CIO to drive enterprise AI adoption at the K-12 curriculum company: prioritization, governance, AI literacy, and ROI measurement.

jobs.title: Senior Learning Technologist and AI Analyst
jobs.scope_summary: Owns the college's AI-in-teaching portfolio: faculty development, assessment guidance, policy, and course-level AI integration.

jobs.title: Sr Instructional Designer, AI Enhanced Learning
jobs.scope_summary: Advanced instructional design with an emphasis on integrating AI into teaching, learning, and course development.

jobs.title: External Affairs Lead
jobs.scope_summary: Leads external affairs and partnerships for aiEDU's K-12 AI literacy and AI readiness mission.

jobs.title: Chief of Staff & Director of Special Projects
jobs.scope_summary: High-trust operator role driving growth and special projects at the nonprofit building AI literacy programs for K-12 schools.

jobs.title: Lead Data Scientist
jobs.scope_summary: Builds LLM, agent, and RAG-based AI-native workflows for Brisk's K-12 teacher AI assistant.

jobs.title: Director, Product (AI Lab)
jobs.scope_summary: Leads product vision and a PM team for the AI Labs portfolio of AI-driven K-12 learning products.

jobs.title: AI Engineer (Digital Workplace)
jobs.scope_summary: Builds enterprise AI copilots and intelligent agents at the assessment nonprofit, integrated with Microsoft 365 and Anthropic models.

jobs.title: Staff AI Research Engineer
jobs.scope_summary: Applied AI research engineering, building and shipping LLM-driven features for language learning.

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineering Manager
jobs.scope_summary: Manages an AI engineering team building generative AI capabilities across Duolingo's education products.

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist (AI Platform)
jobs.scope_summary: Data science for the AI Platform powering AI features across Canvas and the Instructure product suite.

jobs.title: Learning Designer, Technical/AI
jobs.scope_summary: Designs technical and AI-focused course content and learning experiences for Coursera's catalog.
